en: Oh, my God, look at this.
There's a lot of people in that wedding, buddy.
This is not right. This is not right.
ko: 이건 옳지 않아. 이건 옳지 않아.

en: What Sal doesn't know is the bride and groom are actually in on it. Yes.
ko: 살이 모르는 것은 신랑 신부가 사실 이걸 알고 있다는 거야. 맞아.

en: But the 300 strangers in the room are a different story. Definitely not in on it. We're gonna ruin this wedding. Here he comes.
ko: 하지만 방 안의 300명의 낯선 사람들은 전혀 모르는 이야기야. 이 결혼식을 망칠 거야. 이제 그가 온다.

en: All right, buddy, next speech is all yours, pal. Cheers.
ko: 자, 친구, 다음 연설은 네 차례야. 건배.

en: Yeah! Yeah! Here we go. Yes.
Oh, my God. Here we go. Here we go. I hate you guys.
ko: 오, 세상에. 시작해. 시작해. 너희가 싫어.

en: Oh, you hate us? I'm sorry. You hate us?
Crystal and Gary have always been
the most good people I've ever known.
They have always been there for me when I needed them.
ko: 그들은 내가 필요할 때 항상 내 곁에 있어 줬어.

en: They're like loyal dogs. They're like my dogs.
ko: 그들은 충성스러운 개 같아. 내 개 같아.
